entities.name: GUINEA SORGHUM
entities.description: A representative sample of 51 accessions including races guineense, margaritiferum, conspicuum, and roxburghii

entities.name: GRAIN MOLD RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum accessions to resist infection by grain mold pathogens

entities.name: FUSARIUM MONILIFORME
entities.description: A fungal pathogen causing grain mold in sorghum, also known as Gibberella fujikuroi

entities.name: FUSARIUM PALLIDOROSEUM
entities.description: A fungal pathogen causing grain mold in sorghum

entities.name: CURVULARIA LUNATA
entities.description: A fungal pathogen causing grain mold in sorghum, also known as Cochliobolus lunatus

entities.name: IN VITRO SCREENING
entities.description: A laboratory-based method used to evaluate the resistance of sorghum accessions to pathogens

entities.name: SPORE INOCULATION
entities.description: The process of applying spore suspensions to seedlings at 50% anthesis to test for resistance

entities.name: GRAIN MOLD
entities.description: A disease characterized by symptoms on the grain of sorghum caused by fungal pathogens
